name: skill-studio-blog-sync
description: Syncs published articles from Skill Studio AI into Framer CMS.

scripts.pack: vite build && node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'fs'; import { execSync } from 'child_process'; fs.copyFileSync('framer.json', 'dist/framer.json'); execSync('cd dist && zip -r ../plugin.zip .', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
